title: MLH Spring Hackathon 2026
description: Join thousands of hackers for MLH flagship spring event. Build projects across any domain — AI, web, mobile, games, or hardware. Mentors from top companies available throughout the event.

title: Meta Llama Hackathon
description: Build the next generation of AI apps using Meta open-source Llama models. Tracks include agents, RAG systems, multimodal apps, and fine-tuned vertical models.

title: AWS Build On 2026
description: Design and ship cloud-native applications on AWS. Tracks for startups, enterprises, and individual developers. Winning projects may receive AWS credits and startup programme access.

title: DoraHacks DeFi Sprint
description: Compete to build the most innovative DeFi protocol, tooling, or interface. Judges include top Ethereum core developers and fund partners from a16z crypto.

title: Unstop Dev Challenge 2026
description: A pan-India and globally open software development competition testing full-stack skills, algorithms, and system design. Strong career placement support for top finishers.

title: Google AI Hackathon 2026
description: Build with Gemini, Vertex AI, and the broader Google AI platform. Projects are judged on innovation, technical depth, and real-world impact. Cloud credits provided to all teams.

title: ETHGlobal Taipei 2026
description: A 48-hour in-person Ethereum hackathon in Taipei, Taiwan. Build dApps, L2 tooling, account abstraction wallets, or ZK proofs. Top projects receive direct sponsor funding.

title: Climate Tech Hackathon 2026
description: Build software that tackles the climate crisis: carbon accounting, grid optimisation, sustainable supply chains, or climate adaptation tools. Mentors from the UN Environment Programme.

title: Devfolio Health Hack
description: Reimagine healthcare with technology. Tracks: diagnostics AI, patient data privacy, remote monitoring, and mental health. Winning teams pitched to health-focused VCs.

title: GitHub Accelerate Hackathon
description: Ship developer tooling that makes software development faster. Tracks: AI coding assistants, CI/CD improvements, security automation, and open-source sustainability.

title: HackMIT 2026
description: One of the oldest and most prestigious collegiate hackathons in the world. Open to all students, held on the MIT campus. Alumni include founders of companies worth billions.

title: NASA International Space Apps Challenge
description: The world largest hackathon, run simultaneously across 150+ cities. Solve real NASA challenges using open data. Local winners advance to a global judging round.

title: ETHGlobal New York 2026
description: A 48-hour in-person Ethereum hackathon in New York City. Build dApps, L2 tooling, account abstraction wallets, or ZK proofs with sponsors from across the Ethereum ecosystem. Top projects receive direct sponsor funding and mentorship.

title: ETHGlobal Lisbon 2026
description: A 48-hour in-person Ethereum hackathon in Lisbon, Portugal. Work alongside Ethereum core developers and sponsors to build the future of Web3. Top teams receive direct funding from sponsors.

title: ETHOnline 2026
description: ETHGlobal's fully remote hackathon bringing together Ethereum developers worldwide. Build dApps, protocols, and tooling — compete for prizes from leading Web3 sponsors without leaving home.

title: ETHGlobal Tokyo 2026
description: A 48-hour in-person Ethereum hackathon in Tokyo, Japan. Build the next generation of Web3 applications, DeFi protocols, and Ethereum tooling with top-tier sponsor support.
